pay_huawei_rule: 1. Coins purchased can only be used in this application. 2. Payment: The purchase will be charged to your HUAWEI account. 3. Renewal: Your HUAWEI account will be charged within 24 hours before the expiration and the subscription period will be extended for another subscription cycle upon successful deduction. 4. Cancellation: To cancel the subscription renewal, please disable the automatic renewal feature in the "HUAWEI Subscriptions" - "Manage Settings" section at least 24 hours before the current subscription period expires. 5. Payment successful but recharge not taking effect for an extended period? Click here to refresh or send an email to: moboreels@moboreader.com. 6. Manage your subscriptions: You can view, change, or cancel your subscriptions.
pay_unlock_tip: It takes %s Coins to unlock this episode
pay_xiaomi_rule: 1. The coins you purchase can only be used within this app. 2. Payment: Once you confirm your purchase and make the payment, it is charged to your Xiaomi account. 3. Renewal: Your Xiaomi account is charged within 24 hours before the subscription expires, and the subscription renews for another cycle upon successful payment. 4. Canceling Renewal: To cancel renewal, manually turn off the auto-renewal feature in "Xiaomi Subscriptions—Settings Management" at least 24 hours before the current subscription period ends. 5. If your payment is successful but the recharge has not been processed for an extended period, please click here to refresh or email moboreels@moboreader.com. 6. Manage Subscriptions: You can check, change, or cancel your subscription anytime.

shop_reminder: 1. Coins can only be used within this application. 2.Payment successful but recharge not taking effect for an extended period? Click here to refresh or send an email to: moboreels@moboreader.com.
shop_reminder_android: 1. Coins can only be used within this application. 2. Payment: The purchase will be charged to your Google account. 3. Renewal: Your Google account will be charged within 24 hours before the expiration and the subscription period will be extended for another subscription cycle upon successful deduction. 4. Cancellation: To cancel the subscription renewal, please disable the automatic renewal feature in the "Subscriptions" - "Manage Settings" section of Google Play at least 24 hours before the current subscription period expires. If canceled within the last 24 hours before expiration, a subscription fee will be charged. 5. Payment successful but recharge not taking effect for an extended period? Click here to refresh or send an email to: moboreels@moboreader.com. 6. Manage your subscriptions: You can view, change, or cancel your subscriptions.
shop_reminder_ios: 1. Coins can only be used within this application. 2. Payment: The purchase will be charged to your iTunes account. 3. Renewal: Your Apple iTunes account will be charged within 24 hours before the expiration and the subscription period will be extended for another subscription cycle upon successful deduction. 4. Cancellation: To cancel the subscription renewal, please turn off the automatic renewal function in the iTunes/Apple ID settings at least 24 hours before the current subscription period expires. If canceled within the last 24 hours before expiration, a subscription fee will still be charged. 5. Payment successful but recharge not taking effect for an extended period? Click here to refresh or send an email to: moboreels@moboreader.com. 6. Manage your subscriptions: You can view, change, or cancel your subscriptions.
shop_subscriptions_tip: 7.Another purchase option: Accessed Subscription Management to make changes.

upgrade_pop_words: After you change your subscription, you'll get a refund for the unused days left in your current plan. The amount is automatically calculated by %s based on the remaining time. Refunds are processed within a few days, depending on your payment provider or bank.​
upgrate_pop_rules_samevip: The new subscription will take effect immediately upon purchase. The remaining days of your current weekly pass will be added to your total validity period, extending your membership duration. The system will automatically switch you to the new plan and cancel the automatic renewal of your weekly pass.
upgrate_pop_rules_samevip_apple: The new subscription plan will begin automatically once your current plan ends, ensuring that your service remains seamless and uninterrupted.
